backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of the CustomizationPrompt component and all its references from App.tsx, with high confidence and test ID REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing contrast/typography changes and the removal of the CustomizationPrompt overlay.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Handyman Company Website' that mounts the app at the #root div and loads main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page layout with Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Contact, and Footer — with no CustomizationPrompt overlay or timer.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section displaying the company story, founder quote, and a grid of six trust highlight cards with icons, using font-medium body text and orange accent styling.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a controlled quote-request form (name, phone, email, service, message), a success state, and a sidebar showing phone, email, service area, and hours.
frontend/src/components/CustomizationPro: Empty file — the CustomizationPrompt component has been fully deleted as part of the feature removal.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Multi-column footer with brand info, quick navigation links, services list, and contact details using font-medium/bold text and orange accent icons.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, strong white overlay, headline, tagline, CTA buttons linking to contact and phone, and three stat counters.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive fixed navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a mobile hamburger menu, scroll-based shadow effect, and a 'Get a Quote' CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section displaying an 8-item grid of handyman offerings (plumbing, electrical, carpentry, etc.) with icons, descriptions, and a service-area banner.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, login, and logout via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Oswald/Inter fonts, defining CSS custom properties for the design system (orange, ink, snow palettes), and Tailwind utility overrides.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Oswald/Inter), an orange/ink/snow color palette, box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the Pro Fix Handyman ICP site, with a pending task to fully remove the CustomizationPrompt admin/edit overlay component from the codebase.
